chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-2182 of 2022 _______________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of Misc. No.886/2023 2. For order as to maintainability of petition 12.08.2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG Mr. Abdullah Nizamani, advocate for the respondent No.8 --------- This is an old petition of 2022, which is over 03 years ago. It was last taken up on 10.01.2024, which is over 18 months ago, learned counsel for the petitioner was called absent without intimation. Since then, learned counsel for the petitioner has made no serious efforts to have this old petition fixed for hearing and the question of maintainability still remains outstanding. Once-again, today, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). Head of Const. Benches Judge Nadir*
